title: lycium chinense var. ovatum
intro: Lycium chinense var. ovatum, also known as the Chinese boxthorn or boxthorn, is a plant species belonging to the nightshade family, with ovate leaves and small, red or purple berries. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Lycium chinense var. ovatum include its potential to improve vision, boost the immune system, and protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Lycium chinense var. ovatum is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
